headlines.title: NextEra-Dominion Energy Merger To Create World’s Largest Electric Utility
headlines.summary: Leading clean energy utility, NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE), has agreed to buy Dominion Energy (NYSE:D) in an all-stock transaction valued at $66.8 billion, marking the largest power utility acquisition on record. headlines.title: European Airlines Say Jet Fuel Supply Is Under Control for Summer
